//: Alexa custom-skill INTERACTION MODEL. Paste this into the Alexa Developer Console → Build → Custom → Interaction Model → JSON Editor, then Save Model + Build Model. Invocation name 'my agent' → 'Alexa, ask my agent to <task>'. The freeform task is captured in an AMAZON.SearchQuery slot named 'query' and POSTed to the receiver, which extracts request.intent.slots.query.value (see src/server.mjs extractTaskText). NOTE: AMAZON.SearchQuery slots may ONLY be used in samples where they are NOT the entire utterance and are preceded by carrier words (Amazon constraint) — so the bare '{query}' catch-all is intentionally omitted; use a carrier phrase like 'ask my agent to ...'.
